title: Cloud Infrastructure Modernization
text: This statement of work covers the migration of legacy infrastructure to AWS cloud platform including containerization and CI/CD pipeline setup. The project includes architecture design, implementation and training.

title: Data Analytics Platform
text: Development of a business intelligence dashboard using Apache Spark and Tableau for real-time analytics and reporting. Includes data pipeline design and performance optimization.

title: Hebrew Language Processing
text: מערכת לעיבוד שפה טבעית בעברית המאפשרת חיפוש טקסט מלא וניתוח סנטימנט בשפה העברית. המערכת תומכת במגוון ניבים ומבנים לשוניים.

title: Arabic Document Management
text: نظام إدارة الوثائق باللغة العربية مع دعم البحث في النصوص الكاملة والفهرسة التلقائية للمحتوى العربي. يدعم النظام مختلف اللهجات العربية.

title: Security Compliance Audit
text: Comprehensive security audit covering SOC2 Type II compliance requirements including access controls, encryption standards, and incident response procedures. Includes penetration testing and vulnerability assessment.

title: Mobile Application Development
text: Native mobile application development for iOS and Android platforms with offline support and real-time synchronization capabilities. Features include push notifications and biometric authentication.
